Hiroshi Tanahashi, the 'Ace' of New Japan, challenged the dominant Shingo Takagi for the NEVER Openweight Championship. Tanahashi sought to prove he could still compete at the highest level against NJPW's hardest-hitting star, while Takagi aimed to solidify his reign. This match was a generational clash, showcasing Tanahashi's resilience against Takagi's relentless power.

match: Will Ospreay vs. Zack Sabre Jr.
description: Will Ospreay and Zack Sabre Jr. renewed their intense rivalry in a New Japan Cup quarter-final match, with a coveted spot in the semi-finals on the line. Their contrasting styles – Ospreay's aerial brilliance versus Sabre's intricate technicality – always guaranteed a captivating and unpredictable encounter. This was another high-stakes chapter in their ongoing battle for supremacy.

Will Ospreay and Shingo Takagi clashed in the highly anticipated final of the New Japan Cup, with the winner earning a shot at the IWGP World Heavyweight Championship. This marked their third major singles encounter, a trilogy of battles that had consistently delivered breathtaking action. Both men sought to prove their dominance and claim the ultimate prize in NJPW.

match: The Young Bucks ( Matt Jackson and Nick Jackson ) vs. Death Triangle ( Pac and Rey Fenix )
description: The Young Bucks defended their AEW World Tag Team Championships against the dynamic duo of PAC and Rey Fenix from Death Triangle. This match was a high-octane spectacle, pitting two of the most athletic and innovative tag teams in the world against each other. The rivalry between The Elite and Death Triangle added an extra layer of intensity to this championship clash.

Will Ospreay defended his IWGP World Heavyweight Championship against his fiercest rival, Shingo Takagi, in a highly anticipated main event. This marked their fourth singles encounter, a testament to their incredible chemistry and the intensity of their rivalry. Ospreay, having recently captured the title, faced his greatest challenge yet in the relentless 'Dragon.'

Utami Hayashishita defended her prestigious World of Stardom Championship against the formidable Syuri in a critically acclaimed main event. Utami's reign as the 'Red Belt' champion faced its toughest test against Syuri's striking prowess and undeniable intensity. This match was a brutal, hard-hitting affair, showcasing the best of Stardom's joshi talent.

event: Wrestle Grand Slam in Tokyo Dome
description: Hiroshi Tanahashi defended the NEVER Openweight Championship against Shingo Takagi in a highly anticipated rematch at Wrestle Grand Slam in the Tokyo Dome. Tanahashi had previously dethroned Takagi, and 'The Dragon' was determined to reclaim his title on a grand stage. This was a clash of NJPW's enduring 'Ace' against one of its most dominant modern stars.

Ilja Dragunov challenged WALTER for the NXT UK Championship in a highly anticipated rematch that promised unparalleled brutality and intensity. Following their first acclaimed encounter, Dragunov was determined to finally dethrone the dominant champion and end his historic reign. This was a visceral, career-defining battle where both men pushed their bodies to the absolute limit.

match: The Young Bucks ( Matt Jackson and Nick Jackson ) vs. Lucha Brothers ( Pentagón Jr. and Rey Fenix )
description: The Young Bucks defended their AEW World Tag Team Championships against the Lucha Brothers in a brutal Steel Cage Match, aiming to settle their long-standing, intense rivalry. The confines of the cage promised an even more violent and high-flying spectacle, with both teams pushing the boundaries of tag team wrestling. This was the definitive chapter in their epic feud for tag team supremacy.

Tomohiro Ishii, the 'Stone Pitbull,' clashed with 'The Dragon' Shingo Takagi in a highly anticipated G1 Climax 31 opening night encounter. Both men are renowned for their relentless, hard-hitting strong style, promising a brutal and unforgiving slugfest. This match was a pure test of endurance and fighting spirit, setting a high bar for the tournament.

Bryan Danielson made his highly anticipated AEW in-ring debut against the reigning AEW World Champion, Kenny Omega, in a non-title dream match. This monumental clash at Dynamite Grand Slam pitted two of the greatest wrestlers of their generation against each other. The match was a technical masterclass and a statement of intent from Danielson, immediately elevating AEW's main event scene.

match: Lucha Brothers ( Pentagón Jr. and Fénix ) vs. Jinetes del Aire ( El Hijo del Vikingo and Laredo Kid )
description: The Lucha Brothers defended their AAA World Tag Team Championships against the dynamic duo of El Hijo del Vikingo and Laredo Kid in a breathtaking lucha libre spectacle. This match was a showcase of unparalleled athleticism and high-flying innovation, characteristic of AAA's exciting style. Both teams pushed the limits of tag team wrestling in a thrilling championship encounter.

match: Superkliq ( Adam Cole , Matt Jackson and Nick Jackson ) vs. Christian Cage and Jurassic Express ( Jungle Boy and Luchasaurus )
description: The Superkliq (Adam Cole and The Young Bucks) faced Christian Cage and Jurassic Express in a chaotic Falls Count Anywhere match, aiming to settle their intense, multi-man rivalry. This brutal encounter saw weapons, high spots, and brawling spill throughout the arena. It was a wild, no-holds-barred spectacle designed to bring their bitter feud to a decisive and destructive end.

The ultimate culmination of a nearly three-year story arc. 'Hangman' Adam Page, after suffering crushing defeats, losing his friends, and battling profound anxiety, has finally clawed his way back to the top of the mountain. Standing in his way is the AEW World Champion Kenny Omega—his former tag team partner and the man whose shadow Page has never been able to escape. With the crowd entirely behind the anxious millennial cowboy, this is a match about redemption, self-belief, and fulfilling a destiny years in the making.

'Hangman' Adam Page defended his AEW World Championship against Bryan Danielson in a highly anticipated, grueling 60-minute time limit draw. This marked Page's first major title defense against one of the world's best, showcasing his fighting spirit and resilience. The match was an instant classic, a testament to both men's incredible stamina and technical prowess.

Kazuchika Okada, the newly crowned IWGP World Heavyweight Champion, faced Will Ospreay in a monumental title unification match on Wrestle Kingdom 16 Night 2. Ospreay, having returned with his own 'real' championship, sought to prove his legitimacy and reclaim the top prize. This was a deeply personal clash, determining the undisputed champion of New Japan Pro-Wrestling.

Cody Rhodes and Sammy Guevara clashed in a high-stakes Ladder Match to determine the Undisputed TNT Champion. With Cody returning as the former champion and Guevara holding the interim title, this was a battle to unify the gold. Both men risked it all in a brutal, daredevil encounter to claim sole possession of the prestigious championship.

Will Ospreay defended his RevPro British Heavyweight Championship against the tenacious underdog Michael Oku in a highly emotional main event. Oku, a beloved homegrown talent, faced the daunting task of overcoming the globally renowned Ospreay. This match was a captivating David vs. Goliath story, culminating in one of the biggest upsets in RevPro history.

match: Will Ospreay vs. Zack Sabre Jr.
description: This New Japan Cup semi-final pitted two of NJPW's most acclaimed technical and high-flying stars against each other. Zack Sabre Jr., the submission master, aimed to outwit the dynamic Will Ospreay for a spot in the prestigious tournament final. The stakes were high, with both men looking to prove their dominance and earn a shot at the IWGP World Heavyweight Championship.

match: Shingo Takagi vs. Zack Sabre Jr.
description: The New Japan Cup final saw the submission specialist Zack Sabre Jr. clash with the powerhouse Shingo Takagi in a battle of contrasting styles. The winner would earn a coveted shot at the IWGP World Heavyweight Championship, making this a high-stakes encounter for ultimate glory. Both men pushed their limits in a grueling contest to claim the prestigious tournament victory.

match: Briscoe Brothers ( Jay Briscoe and Mark Briscoe ) vs. FTR ( Cash Wheeler and Dax Harwood )
description: This highly anticipated dream match marked the first encounter in a legendary trilogy, with FTR challenging the iconic Briscoe Brothers for the ROH World Tag Team Championship. It was a pivotal moment for Ring of Honor, being the first show under Tony Khan's ownership, adding immense pressure and significance to the title bout. The clash instantly became a modern classic, setting the stage for an unforgettable rivalry.

match: Jericho Appreciation Society ( Chris Jericho , Daniel Garcia , Jake Hager , Angelo Parker and Matt Menard ) vs. Blackpool Combat Club ( Bryan Danielson and Jon Moxley ) , Eddie Kingston , and Santana and Ortiz
description: The Jericho Appreciation Society and the Blackpool Combat Club, along with their allies, engaged in a chaotic Anarchy in the Arena match to settle their intensely personal and violent feud. This no-disqualification, no-countout brawl was designed to be the ultimate blow-off, showcasing the deep animosity between Chris Jericho's 'sports entertainers' and Jon Moxley's gritty fighters. The arena descended into pandemonium as both factions fought for supremacy.

match: The Young Bucks ( Matt Jackson and Nick Jackson ) vs. Lucha Brothers ( Penta Oscuro and Rey Fenix )
description: Another thrilling chapter in their storied rivalry, this match saw The Young Bucks and Lucha Brothers reignite their high-flying feud. Following their iconic ladder match at All Out 2021, both teams were eager to prove their dominance in AEW's tag team division. The encounter promised breathtaking athleticism and non-stop action from four of the world's most innovative tag team competitors.

This was the third and final brutal encounter in Cody Rhodes' incredible trilogy against Seth 'Freakin' Rollins, taking place inside the unforgiving Hell in a Cell structure. Rhodes famously competed with a completely torn pectoral muscle, turning an already anticipated match into a legendary display of grit and determination. His heroic performance solidified his 'American Nightmare' comeback story against his bitter rival.

match: FTR ( Cash Wheeler and Dax Harwood ) vs. Briscoe Brothers ( Jay Briscoe and Mark Briscoe )
description: The highly anticipated second chapter in their epic trilogy, this time for the ROH World Tag Team Championship in a brutal 2-out-of-3 Falls match. FTR had defeated the Briscoes at Supercard of Honor, and the Briscoes were desperate to reclaim their titles and prove their home turf dominance. The stakes were incredibly high, with both teams pushing their limits in a grueling, unforgettable contest.

Another installment in their storied rivalry, often considered one of the best in modern wrestling, as Shingo Takagi and Will Ospreay clashed in the G1 Climax 32. Both men were vying for crucial points in the prestigious tournament, with Ospreay looking to avenge past losses and establish himself as the top dog. Their matches are always high-octane, showcasing incredible athleticism and hard-hitting action.

The grand final of the G1 Climax 32 pitted former stablemates and long-time rivals Kazuchika Okada and Will Ospreay against each other. Okada, the 'Rainmaker,' sought to win his record-tying fourth G1, while Ospreay aimed to win his first and solidify his claim as the best in the world. The winner would earn a coveted shot at the IWGP World Heavyweight Championship at Wrestle Kingdom.

match: Will Ospreay vs. Ricky Knight Jr.
description: A significant match for RevPro's 10th-anniversary celebration, this bout showcased top international star Will Ospreay against one of RevPro's promising homegrown talents, Ricky Knight Jr. This was a chance for RKJ to prove himself against one of the world's best, while Ospreay aimed to deliver a classic for his former home promotion. The match highlighted the blend of established and rising talent within RevPro.

match: United Empire ( Will Ospreay , Kyle Fletcher and Mark Davis ) vs. Death Triangle ( Pac , Penta El Zero M and Rey Fenix )
description: This high-stakes Trios Championship tournament semi-final pitted two of AEW's most dynamic factions, United Empire and Death Triangle, against each other. Both teams were desperate to advance and become the inaugural AEW World Trios Champions. The match promised incredible athleticism and fast-paced action from six of the world's top performers, all vying for a place in history.

A brutal, hard-hitting contest for the Intercontinental Championship, marking Gunther's first major defense on a premium live event against the veteran Sheamus. Challenging in front of a passionate UK crowd, Sheamus pushed Gunther to his absolute limits in an intensely physical encounter. This match is widely regarded as a modern classic for its sheer brutality and elevated both competitors.

match: FTR ( Cash Wheeler and Dax Harwood ) vs. Aussie Open ( Kyle Fletcher and Mark Davis )
description: FTR, holding the ROH and AAA Tag Team Championships, put their IWGP Tag Team Championship on the line against the formidable Aussie Open in NJPW's return to the UK. This was a clash of two of the world's top tag teams, with Aussie Open looking to capture their first major NJPW gold and FTR aiming to solidify their reign. The match was a testament to global tag team excellence.

match: Rey Fenix vs. El Hijo del Vikingo
description: A highly anticipated dream match between two of AAA's most spectacular high-flyers, with the AAA Mega Championship on the line. Vikingo, the reigning champion, faced a formidable challenge from the returning Rey Fenix, promising an aerial spectacle for AAA's biggest event of the year. The match was a showcase of innovative Lucha Libre at its finest.

match: Laredo Kid vs. El Hijo del Vikingo
description: A thrilling encounter between two of AAA's premier luchadores, with the AAA Mega Championship at stake. El Hijo del Vikingo, known for his innovative high-flying, defended his title against the experienced and equally agile Laredo Kid. This match showcased the incredible athleticism and unique style of modern Lucha Libre, captivating fans with its fast-paced action.

A highly anticipated semi-final match in the IWGP United States Heavyweight Championship tournament, pitting Will Ospreay against the charismatic Tetsuya Naito. Ospreay, the reigning champion, faced Naito, who was looking to add another major title to his decorated career. This was a clash of two of NJPW's biggest stars, with the winner advancing to the tournament final.

match: FTR ( Cash Wheeler and Dax Harwood ) vs. Briscoe Brothers ( Jay Briscoe and Mark Briscoe )
description: The epic conclusion to their legendary trilogy, this brutal Dog Collar match for the ROH World Tag Team Championship saw FTR and the Briscoe Brothers settle their intensely personal rivalry. With the series tied 1-1, this was the ultimate rubber match to determine the undisputed best tag team in the world. The match cemented their legacy as one of the greatest tag team feuds ever.

A special main event for TAKATaichi Together's 50th Anniversary show, featuring two of NJPW's most popular heavyweights, Shingo Takagi and Taichi. Shingo, a former IWGP World Heavyweight Champion, faced the charismatic Taichi in a rare inter-promotional match. This unique and hard-hitting spectacle provided a memorable experience for the fans.

A dream match years in the making, with the IWGP United States Heavyweight Championship on the line, marked Kenny Omega's highly anticipated return to NJPW against Will Ospreay. Ospreay had publicly declared himself the true 'Best Bout Machine' in Omega's absence, making this a deeply personal clash for supremacy and the soul of NJPW's foreign talent. The match delivered an instant classic, living up to its immense hype.

match: Death Triangle ( Pac , Penta El Zero M and Rey Fenix ) vs. The Elite ( Kenny Omega , Matt Jackson and Nick Jackson )
description: The sixth and final match in their Best of 7 series for the AEW World Trios Championship, this was a winner-take-all ladder match between Death Triangle and The Elite. Death Triangle had taken an early lead, but The Elite mounted an incredible comeback, making this a high-stakes, brutal war. The series had been a testament to the athleticism and rivalry between two of AEW's top factions.

A Texas Death Match, this brutal encounter was the culmination of a deeply personal and violent feud between 'Hangman' Adam Page and Jon Moxley. Page sought revenge and redemption after Moxley injured him with a concussion, while Moxley aimed to prove his dominance as the ruthless leader of the Blackpool Combat Club. The stakes were incredibly high, promising a bloody and unforgiving encounter.

A grueling 60-minute Iron Man match for the AEW World Championship, born from MJF's arrogant reign and Bryan Danielson's relentless pursuit of the title. Danielson had to win every match for a month to earn this opportunity, making it a test of endurance, skill, and sheer will against the self-proclaimed 'Salt of the Earth.' The match was a modern epic, pushing both competitors to their absolute limits.

match: Kenny Omega vs. El Hijo del Vikingo
description: A highly anticipated dream match that finally came to fruition, pitting two of the world's most innovative and exciting wrestlers, Kenny Omega and El Hijo del Vikingo, against each other. Vikingo, the AAA Mega Champion, made his AEW debut to face Omega, a former champion and 'Best Bout Machine,' in a non-title, pure spectacle of athleticism. The match exceeded all expectations, delivering a breathtaking display of wrestling.

match: Kevin Owens and Sami Zayn vs. The Usos ( Jey Uso and Jimmy Uso )
description: The emotional climax of the greatest cinematic storyline in modern WWE history. For nearly a year, Sami Zayn desperately sought the approval of Roman Reigns and The Bloodline, finding genuine brotherhood with Jey Uso before ultimately being betrayed and cast out. Now, reunited with his lifelong friend and bitter rival Kevin Owens, Zayn looks to dismantle The Bloodline piece by piece. Standing across from them are The Usos, the most dominant tag team champions in history, torn between family loyalty and the ghosts of their past. The stakes are immense in this deeply personal main event.

match: Gunther vs. Drew McIntyre vs. Sheamus
description: A triple threat match for the Intercontinental Championship, bringing together three of WWE's most hard-hitting competitors: Gunther, Drew McIntyre, and Sheamus. Following their acclaimed match at Clash at the Castle, Sheamus and Gunther reignited their rivalry, with Drew McIntyre adding another layer of intensity to this highly anticipated, physical encounter on the grandest stage. The match was a brutal showcase of European strong style.

A hard-hitting singles match for the provisional KOPW 2023 Championship, contested under unique 'Chain Match' rules. Shingo Takagi, known for his brute force, faced Aaron Henare, a powerful member of United Empire, in a contest designed to test their physicality and determination. The unusual stipulation added an extra layer of brutality to their rivalry, making for a memorable clash.

event: Best of the Super Juniors Finals
description: The highly anticipated final of the Best of the Super Juniors 30 tournament, featuring two dynamic junior heavyweights, Master Wato and Titán. Master Wato, a rising NJPW star, faced CMLL's high-flying Titán, with the winner earning a shot at the IWGP Junior Heavyweight Championship. This match showcased the future of the junior heavyweight division, delivering a thrilling aerial spectacle.

match: Blackpool Combat Club ( Jon Moxley , Bryan Danielson , Claudio Castagnoli and Wheeler Yuta ) vs. The Elite ( Kenny Omega , Matt Jackson , Nick Jackson and "Hangman" Adam Page )
description: An Anarchy in the Arena match, this was the violent culmination of a bitter rivalry between The Elite and the Blackpool Combat Club. The feud had escalated for months, with both factions seeking to establish dominance and destroy the other. This chaotic, no-rules brawl was designed to settle their blood feud once and for all, resulting in a memorable and destructive encounter.

match: Blackpool Combat Club ( Jon Moxley and Claudio Castagnoli ) and Shota Umino vs. Chaos ( Kazuchika Okada and Tomohiro Ishii ) and Hiroshi Tanahashi
description: A star-studded six-man tag team match featuring top talent from both AEW's Blackpool Combat Club and NJPW's Chaos and main eventers. This match furthered the ongoing NJPW vs. BCC storyline, with Jon Moxley and Claudio Castagnoli bringing their brutal style against NJPW's legendary figures like Kazuchika Okada and Hiroshi Tanahashi. It was a preview of potential Forbidden Door clashes and a showcase of international wrestling talent.

A highly anticipated rematch for the IWGP United States Heavyweight Championship, following their instant classic at Wrestle Kingdom 17. Will Ospreay, now the champion, faced Kenny Omega on AEW soil, intensifying their personal rivalry and battle for the title of 'Best in the World.' This was a chance for Omega to reclaim his championship and prove his dominance in a match that exceeded all expectations.

A rare dream match between two of Japan's top heavyweights, representing different promotions: AJPW's Kento Miyahara and NOAH's Katsuhiko Nakajima. This non-title encounter was a pure exhibition of skill and fighting spirit, allowing fans to witness a clash between two of the most acclaimed wrestlers in the modern puroresu scene. The match delivered a hard-hitting and memorable contest.

match: FTR ( Cash Wheeler and Dax Harwood ) vs. Bullet Club Gold ( Jay White and Juice Robinson )
description: A highly anticipated match for the AEW World Tag Team Championship, pitting the reigning champions FTR against the newly formed and dangerous Bullet Club Gold (Jay White and Juice Robinson). Jay White and Juice Robinson, with their cunning tactics, sought to dethrone the respected FTR and establish their dominance in AEW's tag division. The encounter was a clash of styles and philosophies in tag team wrestling.

A crucial semi-final match in the G1 Climax 33 tournament, with a spot in the final on the line. Tetsuya Naito, a multi-time G1 winner, faced Will Ospreay, who was determined to win his first G1 and solidify his position as a top gaijin star. This was a clash of two main eventers vying for ultimate glory, delivering a thrilling and unpredictable contest.

The grand final of the G1 Climax 33, a storied rivalry between two of NJPW's biggest icons, Tetsuya Naito and Kazuchika Okada. Naito, seeking his third G1 victory, faced Okada, who aimed for a record-breaking fifth win. This was a main event clash between two pillars of NJPW, with the winner earning a shot at the IWGP World Heavyweight Championship at Wrestle Kingdom.

Another chapter in their legendary rivalry, this time for RevPro's 11th Anniversary show, with the Undisputed British Heavyweight Championship on the line. Will Ospreay, the defending champion, faced his long-time rival Shingo Takagi in a highly anticipated, hard-hitting bout. This was a special return for both men to a promotion where Ospreay had deep roots, delivering an instant classic.

A brutal Strap Match, designed to settle the intensely personal feud between Bryan Danielson and Ricky Starks. Starks had attacked Danielson, leading to a challenge from the 'American Dragon' to prove who was the tougher man. This match promised a violent, unforgiving contest where victory could only be achieved by touching all four corners while dragging your opponent.

A highly anticipated grudge match, stemming from Konosuke Takeshita's betrayal of The Elite to align with Don Callis. Kenny Omega sought revenge against his former protégé, who had been groomed by Callis to surpass him. This deeply personal encounter was a clash of generations and styles, with Omega looking to teach Takeshita a harsh lesson.

A significant challenge for the IWGP United States Heavyweight Championship, with Will Ospreay defending against the powerful and promising Yota Tsuji, who had recently returned from excursion. Tsuji, a member of Los Ingobernables de Japon, aimed to capture his first major singles title and establish himself as a top contender. The match showcased Tsuji's potential against one of NJPW's top stars.

match: Bryan Danielson vs. Zack Sabre Jr.
description: A long-awaited dream match between two of the world's premier technical wrestlers, Bryan Danielson and Zack Sabre Jr., finally happening after years of anticipation. Danielson, the 'American Dragon,' faced ZSJ, the 'Submission Master,' in a pure wrestling clinic to determine who was the superior grappler. This was a contest for technical supremacy, delivering a masterclass in mat wrestling.

match: Will Ospreay vs. Zack Sabre Jr.
description: Another chapter in their long-standing rivalry, this time for the IWGP UK Heavyweight Championship, with Zack Sabre Jr. defending on home soil against Will Ospreay. Ospreay, a former champion, sought to reclaim the title from his technical nemesis in a highly anticipated contest. Their clashes are always a fascinating blend of high-flying and intricate grappling, showcasing their incredible chemistry.

A highly anticipated dream match saw global sensation Will Ospreay make a special appearance in Impact Wrestling to face one of its most dynamic and respected competitors, "Speedball" Mike Bailey. This non-title encounter was a pure exhibition of athletic excellence, with both men aiming to prove who was the superior high-flyer and technical wizard on a major stage.

Returning from his excursion, the promising "Roughneck" Shota Umino sought to prove he was ready for the main event scene by challenging the formidable Will Ospreay. This match was a crucial test for Umino, a chance to show that he could hang with NJPW's elite and establish himself as a future ace.

event: Giant Series 2023: Hokkaido Edition Day 6 (Evening Show)
description: The "Genius of the Kick" Katsuhiko Nakajima, a former ace from Pro Wrestling NOAH, continued his invasion of AJPW by challenging its reigning Triple Crown Champion, Yuma Aoyagi, in a non-title encounter. This high-stakes clash pitted Nakajima's brutal precision against Aoyagi's fighting spirit, as the champion defended his promotion's honor against the formidable outsider.

A rivalry built on pure, unadulterated hatred and home invasions. Swerve Strickland made things deeply personal by breaking into 'Hangman' Adam Page's home and threatening his family, crossing lines rarely seen in professional wrestling. Page, usually a conflicted and honorable competitor, has been pushed past his breaking point, transforming into a vengeful, bloodthirsty brawler. As they enter a Texas Death Match, there are no rules and no limits. This isn't about championships or rankings; it's about survival, punishment, and settling a score in the most violent way possible.

A true dream match, this encounter pitted two of Japan's absolute best against each other: AJPW's "Ace" Kento Miyahara and the invading "Genius of the Kick" Katsuhiko Nakajima. This highly anticipated bout was a battle for supremacy, with both men vying to prove who was the superior professional wrestler and the true face of Japanese wrestling.

This highly anticipated rematch saw Kazuchika Okada seek redemption against Bryan Danielson, who had controversially defeated him with a broken arm at Forbidden Door. The "Rainmaker" aimed to definitively prove his superiority on NJPW's biggest stage, while Danielson looked to cement his claim as the "best in the world" by once again conquering the legendary Okada.

Máscara Dorada's triumphant return to CMLL saw him immediately thrust into a high-stakes singles encounter against the formidable Templario. This clash of styles pitted Dorada's breathtaking aerial artistry against Templario's powerful and methodical approach, serving as a significant test for the returning luchador and a showcase of CMLL's premier talent.

A brutal clash of titans, this match pitted two of professional wrestling's most intense and hard-hitting competitors, Jon Moxley and Shingo Takagi, against each other. This was a pure fight, with both men known for their relentless aggression and ability to absorb punishment, vying to prove who was the tougher and more dominant force.

In a highly emotional and significant encounter, Will Ospreay faced his former stable leader and long-time rival, Kazuchika Okada, in what was Ospreay's final NJPW singles match before departing for AEW. This was a monumental farewell, a chance for Ospreay to make one last statement against the "Rainmaker" and potentially pass the torch in a dramatic fashion.

As part of his highly anticipated "farewell tour" before joining AEW, Will Ospreay made a special appearance in TNA to face the formidable "Walking Weapon" Josh Alexander. This dream match pitted two of the world's premier technical and power wrestlers against each other, with both men aiming to represent their respective promotions with honor and deliver a wrestling clinic.

match: Zack Sabre Jr. vs. Bryan Danielson
description: Billed as a dream match for technical wrestling purists, this encounter pitted two of the world's most acclaimed grappling specialists, Zack Sabre Jr. and Bryan Danielson, against each other. The match was a masterclass in submissions and counter-submissions, with both men vying to prove who possessed the superior mat wrestling prowess and strategic mind.

In a career-defining moment, Michael Oku finally got his long-awaited opportunity to face the global sensation Will Ospreay in his home promotion of RevPro. This highly emotional match was Oku's chance to overcome his long-time rival and prove he could defeat one of the world's best, solidifying his place at the top of the British wrestling scene.

In his highly anticipated debut as a full-time AEW signee, Will Ospreay immediately faced a formidable challenge in Konosuke Takeshita, a fellow member of the Don Callis Family. This explosive encounter served as Ospreay's official introduction to the AEW audience, showcasing his incredible talent against a powerful and athletic opponent within his own faction.

This unique encounter pitted Will Ospreay against his former United Empire stablemate and protege, Kyle Fletcher, in a competitive yet respectful contest. The match served as a test for Fletcher to prove how much he had grown under Ospreay's influence, while also showcasing the incredible talent within the Don Callis Family.

Billed as a dream match between two of the greatest professional wrestlers on the planet, Will Ospreay and Bryan Danielson finally collided in a highly anticipated encounter. This clash of styles, pitting Ospreay's breathtaking aerial offense against Danielson's unparalleled technical prowess, was a battle for supremacy and the right to be called the best in the world.

In his first major defense of the Undisputed WWE Universal Championship since "finishing the story" at WrestleMania, Cody Rhodes faced the formidable challenge of veteran AJ Styles. This high-stakes encounter saw Styles, a multi-time former champion, aim to immediately dethrone the new champion and reclaim his place at the top of WWE.

A brutal, hard-hitting encounter saw NOAH's powerhouse Masa Kitamiya go toe-to-toe with NJPW's "Stone Pitbull" Tomohiro Ishii in a special inter-promotional clash. This match was a pure test of endurance and fighting spirit, with both men known for their relentless strong-style offense and ability to absorb incredible punishment.

A rare and highly anticipated inter-promotional dream match brought together CMLL's technical wizard Hechicero and NJPW's submission master Zack Sabre Jr. This clash of grappling styles promised a captivating display of holds, counter-holds, and strategic mat wrestling, as both men sought to prove their technical superiority.

A true dream match, this encounter pitted AEW's charismatic and ruthless Swerve Strickland against the globally acclaimed Will Ospreay in a highly anticipated inter-promotional clash. Both men, at the peak of their careers, aimed to steal the show and prove who was the more dominant and exciting force in professional wrestling.

Returning from injury, the self-proclaimed "Devil" MJF immediately set his sights on the newly arrived Will Ospreay, challenging him in a highly anticipated main event. This match served as a significant return for MJF and a major test for Ospreay, as both men vied for supremacy and main event positioning in AEW.

In the grueling G1 Climax 34 tournament, Konosuke Takeshita faced El Phantasmo in a crucial block match where every point was vital for advancing to the finals. This clash of styles saw Takeshita's power and athleticism meet Phantasmo's cunning and high-flying antics, with both competitors desperate to secure a victory and keep their tournament hopes alive.

In a monumental non-title encounter at AEW All In in Wembley Stadium, Will Ospreay faced the reigning AEW World Champion, MJF, in front of a record-breaking crowd. This highly anticipated clash saw Ospreay aim to make a massive statement by defeating AEW's top champion, while MJF sought to prove his dominance against one of the world's best.

Returning from injury, the legendary Bryan Danielson faced the red-hot and dangerous Swerve Strickland in a highly anticipated clash at AEW All In in Wembley Stadium. This encounter pitted Danielson's technical mastery against Swerve's ruthless innovation, with both men aiming to steal the show and solidify their status as top contenders.

A breathtaking display of athleticism and high-flying prowess, this dream match pitted two of the world's most dynamic competitors, Will Ospreay and PAC, against each other. This was a pure spectacle, with both men pushing the limits of aerial combat and technical precision to prove who was the superior high-flyer in AEW.

The intensely personal and bitter rivalry between CM Punk and Drew McIntyre reached a boiling point, culminating in a violent showdown. McIntyre's relentless taunts and mockery of Punk's return fueled a deep-seated animosity, leading to a brutal confrontation where both men sought to inflict maximum damage and settle their score.

match: Konosuke Takeshita vs. Will Ospreay vs. Ricochet
description: A spectacular triple threat dream match brought together three of the most athletic and high-flying wrestlers on the planet: Konosuke Takeshita, Will Ospreay, and Ricochet. This breathtaking encounter was a pure showcase of aerial artistry and innovative offense, with each competitor vying to outshine the others and claim victory in a truly unique contest.

A highly anticipated dream match saw two of the most dynamic and exciting independent wrestlers, Konosuke Takeshita and "Speedball" Mike Bailey, collide in a showcase of their unique talents. This encounter promised a thrilling blend of martial arts strikes, breathtaking acrobatics, and technical precision, as both men aimed to deliver a memorable performance.

match: Zack Sabre Jr. vs. Shingo Takagi
description: This captivating clash pitted Zack Sabre Jr.'s unparalleled technical wizardry and submission expertise against Shingo Takagi's relentless strong-style offense and brute force. It was a battle of contrasting philosophies, with both men striving to prove which wrestling style was superior and could withstand the other's unique assault.

On a major pay-per-view stage, Kyle Fletcher once again faced his mentor and former stable leader, Will Ospreay, in a highly anticipated encounter. This match served as a crucial opportunity for Fletcher to prove his growth and step out of Ospreay's shadow, while Ospreay aimed to maintain his dominance over his talented protege.

A thrilling clash of high-risk, high-reward styles saw Darby Allin's daredevil antics meet Will Ospreay's unparalleled athleticism in a highly anticipated encounter. Both men, known for their willingness to push physical boundaries, aimed to deliver a breathtaking spectacle of innovative offense and death-defying maneuvers.

The recurring mentor-versus-protege dynamic between Will Ospreay and Kyle Fletcher continued on a major pay-per-view stage, signifying the ongoing evolution of their relationship. This encounter was another crucial test for Fletcher, as he sought to finally overcome his former leader and solidify his own standing as a top-tier competitor in AEW.

In a monumental clash, Kazuchika Okada made his highly anticipated AEW singles debut against his long-time rival, Will Ospreay, reigniting their legendary NJPW feud on American soil. This match was a pivotal moment for both men, with Ospreay aiming to finally defeat the "Rainmaker" in AEW and Okada looking to immediately assert his dominance in his new home.

The brash and disrespectful Gabe Kidd, representing the Bullet Club War Dogs, relentlessly targeted Kenny Omega, aiming to tarnish his legacy and the history of the Bullet Club. This deeply personal encounter saw Omega fight to defend his honor and the very foundation of his past against the aggressive newcomer, who sought to make a name for himself at Omega's expense.

match: Cosmic Angels ( Saori Anou , Tam Nakano and Natsupoi ) vs. Neo Genesis ( AZM , Starlight Kid and Miyu Amasaki )
description: In a high-stakes faction warfare encounter, the beloved Cosmic Angels unit, led by Tam Nakano, clashed with the formidable Neo Genesis trio. This intense six-woman tag team match was a battle for supremacy and bragging rights, showcasing the distinct styles and fierce rivalries that define Stardom's vibrant roster.

A hard-hitting clash between two of NJPW's most aggressive young talents saw Yota Tsuji face the volatile Gabe Kidd of the Bullet Club War Dogs. Both men, known for their intense physicality and willingness to push boundaries, sought to establish their dominance and climb the ranks towards main event status.

match: Kenny Omega and Will Ospreay vs. Don Callis Family ( Konosuke Takeshita and Kyle Fletcher )
description: In a highly anticipated and rare tag team pairing, former rivals Kenny Omega and Will Ospreay united to face the treacherous Don Callis Family duo of Konosuke Takeshita and Kyle Fletcher. This match was driven by Omega's quest for revenge against Callis's betrayal, creating a blockbuster showdown featuring four of the world's elite performers.

The deeply personal and tumultuous rivalry between long-time friends and bitter enemies, Kevin Owens and Sami Zayn, reignited in a high-stakes encounter. Their history of betrayals and reconciliations added layers of emotional intensity, as both men fought to prove their superiority and settle their enduring animosity.

A highly anticipated singles clash brought together two of Stardom's most charismatic and athletic top stars, Saya Kamitani and Tam Nakano. This encounter was a testament to their individual prowess and a crucial battle for positioning within the promotion's competitive landscape, often carrying championship implications.

In a unique and emotionally charged encounter, the "Timeless" AEW Women's World Champion Toni Storm faced her devoted protege and biggest admirer, Mariah May. This highly anticipated championship match forced May to confront her idol, creating a compelling narrative of respect, ambition, and the ultimate test of loyalty.

The deeply personal rivalry between Kenny Omega and his former protege, Konosuke Takeshita, reached its boiling point in a highly anticipated showdown. Takeshita's betrayal and alignment with the Don Callis Family fueled Omega's quest for revenge, leading to a brutal encounter where the mentor sought to punish his former student.

As Will Ospreay makes his full-time transition to AEW, this match against his United Empire stablemate Kyle Fletcher represents a pivotal moment. It's a clash of mentor and mentee, where Fletcher aims to prove he can stand on equal footing with the "Aerial Assassin" as Ospreay solidifies his new home.

This highly anticipated encounter pits two of wrestling's most dynamic athletes against each other in a true dream match. With Will Ospreay newly arrived in AEW and Konosuke Takeshita looking to assert the Don Callis Family's dominance, both men aim to make a definitive statement about who truly reigns supreme.

match: Iyo Sky vs. Rhea Ripley vs. Bianca Belair
description: This WrestleMania main event-caliber triple threat brings together three of WWE's most dominant female competitors for ultimate glory. With Iyo Sky, Rhea Ripley, and Bianca Belair all vying for a top championship, the stakes are incredibly high as each woman seeks to cement her legacy on the grandest stage.

match: Street Profits ( Angelo Dawkins and Montez Ford ) vs. DIY ( Johnny Gargano and Tommaso Ciampa ) vs. Motor City Machine Guns ( Alex Shelley and Chris Sabin )
description: This explosive triple threat tag team match on SmackDown pits three distinct duos against each other in a battle for supremacy. With the high-flying Street Profits, the reunited and intense DIY, and the legendary Motor City Machine Guns, every team aims to prove they are the premier force in WWE's tag team division.

At Stardom's prestigious All Star Grand Queendom, Saya Kamitani and Tam Nakano clash in a highly anticipated championship encounter. This match represents a battle between two of Stardom's brightest stars, each determined to hold the top prize and solidify their place at the pinnacle of joshi wrestling.

match: Kenny Omega , Willow Nightingale , Swerve Strickland and The Opps ( Samoa Joe , Powerhouse Hobbs and Katsuyori Shibata ) vs. Death Riders ( Jon Moxley , Claudio Castagnoli , Marina Shafir and Wheeler Yuta ) and The Young Bucks ( Matthew Jackson and Nicholas Jackson )
description: This colossal ten-person tag team match at Double or Nothing is a chaotic collision of AEW's top factions and rivalries. With Kenny Omega and Swerve Strickland leading a formidable alliance against the Death Riders and the Young Bucks, this bout is a high-stakes war for supremacy and bragging rights across the entire promotion.

At Double or Nothing, "Hangman" Adam Page steps up to face the formidable challenge of Will Ospreay, who is rapidly asserting his dominance in AEW. This match is a clash of styles and generations, with Page defending his home turf against the "Aerial Assassin" looking to prove he belongs at the very top of the company.

event: Best of the Super Juniors Finals
description: The culmination of NJPW's grueling Best of the Super Juniors tournament sees Kosei Fujita and Yoh battle it out in the finals. With a guaranteed shot at the IWGP Junior Heavyweight Championship on the line, both competitors will push their limits to claim the coveted trophy and establish themselves as the division's next top contender.

This highly anticipated Dynamite main event pits two of AEW's most electrifying and popular stars, Will Ospreay and Swerve Strickland, against each other. Both men are at the peak of their careers, promising an unforgettable clash of high-octane offense and undeniable swagger as they vie for bragging rights and momentum.

In a thrilling inter-promotional showcase, the high-flying Bandido from AEW/ROH takes on CMLL's legendary Máscara Dorada. This match is a spectacular clash of lucha libre styles, where both men aim to represent their respective promotions with honor and demonstrate their unparalleled athleticism on a grand stage.

match: Bandido and Hologram vs. El Sky Team ( Místico and Máscara Dorada )
description: At Fantastica Mania, Bandido teams with Hologram to face the iconic CMLL duo of Místico and Máscara Dorada, known as El Sky Team. This tag team encounter promises breathtaking lucha libre action, as the established legends defend their home turf against a formidable international challenger.

This dream match at Stardom's The Conversion 2025 pits two of the most intense and respected joshi wrestlers, Sareee and Syuri, against each other. With Sareee's powerful return and Syuri's established dominance, this bout is a collision of wills and skill, promising an unforgettable battle for supremacy.

This hard-hitting NJPW encounter pits two of the company's toughest heavyweights, Taichi and Tomohiro Ishii, against each other. Known for their incredible resilience and stiff strikes, both men will push each other to their absolute limits in a brutal display of fighting spirit and unyielding determination.

At ROH's prestigious Supercard of Honor, the high-flying former ROH World Champion Bandido faces the powerful Konosuke Takeshita. This clash of styles promises a spectacular display of athleticism and intensity, as both men aim to secure a landmark victory on one of Ring of Honor's biggest stages.

match: Will Ospreay and Swerve Strickland vs. The Young Bucks ( Matthew Jackson and Nicholas Jackson )
description: At the monumental All In: Texas, two of AEW's hottest singles stars, Will Ospreay and Swerve Strickland, unite to face the legendary Young Bucks. This dream tag team match pits incredible athleticism against seasoned tag team prowess, as both duos aim to steal the show and make a definitive statement on one of AEW's biggest nights.

The bitter rivalry between "Hangman" Adam Page and Jon Moxley ignites once more at All In: Texas, promising another brutal chapter in their storied feud. Their past encounters have been intensely personal and violent, and this high-stakes clash will undoubtedly push both men to their absolute limits in pursuit of a definitive victory.

In the prestigious Leyenda de Plata tournament, the veteran Máscara Dorada faces the exciting new talent Neón in a generational clash. This match represents a pivotal moment for both luchadores, as Dorada aims to maintain his legacy while Neón seeks to make his mark and prove he is the future of CMLL.

On AEW Collision, the rising star Kyle Fletcher faces the legendary "Natural" Dustin Rhodes in a compelling clash of generations. This match offers Fletcher a significant opportunity to prove his mettle against a seasoned veteran, while Rhodes aims to show he still has plenty left in the tank against one of AEW's brightest prospects.

This monumental SummerSlam encounter pits the "American Nightmare" Cody Rhodes against the legendary John Cena in a generational dream match. With Rhodes carrying the torch as WWE's top star and Cena representing an unparalleled era of dominance, this bout is a symbolic passing of the guard and a clash for ultimate bragging rights.

match: Will Ospreay , Hiroshi Tanahashi , Darby Allin and Golden Lovers ( Kenny Omega and Kota Ibushi ) vs. Death Riders ( Jon Moxley and Claudio Castagnoli ) , Gabe Kidd and The Young Bucks ( Matt Jackson and Nick Jackson )
description: This epic ten-man tag team match at Forbidden Door is a dream collision of AEW and NJPW's biggest stars and most intense rivalries. Featuring the highly anticipated reunion of the Golden Lovers and a chaotic clash between Will Ospreay's alliance and the Death Riders alongside the Young Bucks, this bout is pure faction warfare with immense stakes and history.

At ROH's Death Before Dishonor, the high-flying Bandido takes on the masterful technician Hechicero in a captivating clash of lucha libre styles. This match promises a dynamic blend of aerial artistry and intricate mat wrestling, as both competitors vie for a significant victory on a major Ring of Honor stage.

match: Team Mexico ( Ángel de Oro , Atlantis Jr. , Difunto, Máscara Dorada , Neón , Místico , Templario , Titán , Volador Jr. and Zandokan Jr. ) vs. Team International ( Action Andretti , "Speedball" Mike Bailey , Donovan Dijak , Taiji Ishimori , The Beast Mortos , Michael Oku , Rocky Romero , Lio Rush , TJP and Robbie X )
description: The prestigious International Gran Prix culminates in this epic ten-on-ten elimination match, pitting the best of CMLL's Team Mexico against a formidable Team International. This patriotic battle sees national pride and individual skill on the line, as luchadores from around the world converge to prove their dominance in a truly grand spectacle.

In a truly unprecedented cross-promotional dream match at CMLL's 92nd Anniversary Show, the iconic Místico faces AEW's "Devil" MJF. This clash of cultures and styles pits CMLL's premier luchador against one of professional wrestling's most arrogant and cunning villains, promising an unforgettable spectacle with immense bragging rights at stake.

match: Kazuchika Okada vs. Konosuke Takeshita vs. Máscara Dorada
description: At AEW's All Out, a sensational triple threat match brings together three distinct global talents: the legendary Kazuchika Okada, the powerful Konosuke Takeshita, and the dazzling Máscara Dorada. This high-stakes encounter promises a breathtaking blend of styles, as each competitor vies for a career-defining victory on one of AEW's biggest stages.

At AEW's All Out, "Hangman" Adam Page takes on the rapidly ascending Kyle Fletcher in a pivotal singles contest. This match is a crucial test for Fletcher against a former AEW World Champion, while Page aims to maintain his top-tier status against a hungry and dangerous opponent.

match: Konosuke Takeshita vs. Zack Sabre Jr.
description: At NJPW's King of Pro-Wrestling, the powerful Konosuke Takeshita faces the technical master Zack Sabre Jr. in a captivating clash of styles. This highly anticipated bout pits Takeshita's explosive offense against Sabre Jr.'s intricate submission prowess, promising a strategic and hard-fought battle for supremacy.

match: Brodido ( Bandido and Brody King ) vs. Don Callis Family ( Kazuchika Okada and Konosuke Takeshita )
description: At AEW's WrestleDream, the unlikely but formidable duo of Brodido (Bandido and Brody King) challenges the dominant Don Callis Family's Kazuchika Okada and Konosuke Takeshita. This high-stakes tag team encounter pits two contrasting styles against each other, as both teams battle for faction supremacy and a significant victory on a major pay-per-view.

match: Darby Allin , The Conglomeration ( Mark Briscoe , Orange Cassidy and Kyle O'Reilly ) and Roderick Strong vs. Death Riders ( Jon Moxley , Claudio Castagnoli , Daniel Garcia , Pac and Wheeler Yuta )
description: The brutal Blood and Guts match sees Darby Allin's eclectic alliance, "The Conglomeration," wage war against the relentless Death Riders (Blackpool Combat Club) in a double-ring steel cage. This violent, high-stakes encounter is the culmination of a deeply personal and intense faction rivalry, where only one team can emerge victorious from the crimson-soaked battlefield.

match: FTR ( Dax Harwood and Cash Wheeler ) vs. Brodido ( Bandido and Brody King )
description: At AEW's Full Gear, the acclaimed FTR, known for their "Top Guys" mentality and classic tag team wrestling, face the powerful and dynamic duo of Brodido (Bandido and Brody King). This highly anticipated tag team clash pits two distinct styles against each other, with both teams vying for supremacy in AEW's stacked tag division.

At AEW's Full Gear, the beloved and intense Mark Briscoe takes on the rapidly ascending Kyle Fletcher in a high-stakes singles match. This encounter is a significant test for Fletcher against a hardened veteran, while Briscoe looks to prove his enduring prowess against one of AEW's most promising young talents.

In a spectacular display of lucha libre acrobatics, the legendary Máscara Dorada faces the high-flying sensation Komander. This match promises an exhilarating showcase of aerial maneuvers and lightning-fast action, as both luchadores aim to captivate the audience with their unparalleled athleticism.

At AEW's special Winter Is Coming Dynamite, two of wrestling's most exciting and innovative athletes, "Speedball" Mike Bailey and Kyle Fletcher, collide. This highly anticipated match promises a breathtaking display of strikes, high-flying, and technical prowess, as both men aim to deliver a show-stealing performance.

At AEW's Worlds End, the formidable Kyle Fletcher steps up to face the relentless and violent Jon Moxley in a high-stakes encounter. This match is a brutal test of endurance and skill for Fletcher against a former AEW World Champion, as he aims to prove he can hang with the company's most dangerous competitors.

At the prestigious Wrestle Kingdom 20, two of NJPW's most promising heavyweights, Konosuke Takeshita and Yota Tsuji, collide in a highly anticipated match. This bout pits Takeshita's explosive power against Tsuji's raw intensity, as both men aim to make a definitive statement on the biggest stage in Japanese wrestling.

At Wrestle Kingdom 20, the legendary rivalry between Hiroshi Tanahashi and Kazuchika Okada adds another iconic chapter. This is a clash between "The Ace" and "The Rainmaker," two generational talents whose battles have defined NJPW for over a decade, promising an emotionally charged and historically significant encounter.

match: Shota Umino and Yuya Uemura vs. Tomohiro Ishii and Taichi
description: On the Road to The New Beginning, the promising young duo of Shota Umino and Yuya Uemura face the formidable veteran team of Tomohiro Ishii and Taichi. This tag team match is a crucial test for the rising stars, as they aim to prove their worth against two of NJPW's toughest and most experienced competitors.

This highly anticipated Dynamite main event pits two of AEW's most dynamic and popular stars, Swerve Strickland and Kenny Omega, against each other. With both men known for their incredible athleticism and ability to deliver show-stealing performances, this match promises an unforgettable clash for supremacy and momentum in AEW.

match: Jack Perry , The Rascalz ( Dezmond Xavier & Zachary Wentz ), and The Young Bucks ( Matt Jackson and Nick Jackson ) vs. FTR ( Dax Harwood & Cash Wheeler ) and The Demand ( Ricochet and Gates of Agony ( Bishop Kaun and Toa Liona ))
description: This chaotic ten-man tag team match on Dynamite ignites multiple rivalries, most notably the legendary feud between The Young Bucks and FTR. With Jack Perry and The Rascalz aligning against FTR's formidable team including Ricochet and The Gates of Agony, this bout is a high-stakes faction war with personal grudges and tag team supremacy on the line.

On AEW Dynamite, two of the most innovative and exciting athletes in professional wrestling, Kyle Fletcher and "Speedball" Mike Bailey, collide in a highly anticipated singles match. Fans can expect a breathtaking display of strikes, high-flying, and technical prowess as both men aim to deliver a show-stealing performance.

match: FTR ( Dax Harwood and Cash Wheeler ) vs. The Young Bucks ( Matt Jackson and Nick Jackson )
description: At AEW's Revolution, the legendary rivalry between FTR and The Young Bucks adds another chapter in what is widely considered one of professional wrestling's greatest tag team feuds. With their history of classic matches and undeniable chemistry, this high-stakes encounter promises an emotional and hard-hitting battle for tag team supremacy and bragging rights.

Konosuke Takeshita, now firmly entrenched in the manipulative orbit of Don Callis, had become a dangerous adversary, targeting Jon Moxley and the Blackpool Combat Club. This high-stakes encounter at Revolution was a test of Takeshita's newfound aggression against Moxley's unyielding brutality, a battle for supremacy and a statement in the ongoing war between Callis's faction and the BCC.

This highly anticipated clash brought together two of professional wrestling's most electrifying high-flyers and technical marvels, Andrade El Idolo and Bandido. With both men seeking to establish dominance in AEW's stacked singles division, this match promised a breathtaking display of athleticism and a potential show-stealer at Revolution.

This New Japan Cup Final pitted two hungry young lions, Callum Newman and Yuya Uemura, against each other in a career-defining match. With the prestigious trophy and a guaranteed shot at a major NJPW championship on the line, both competitors were desperate to prove themselves and seize their moment in the spotlight.

match: Místico and JetSpeed ( Kevin Knight & “Speedball” Mike Bailey ) vs. Hechicero , Volador Jr. , and El Clon
description: A star-studded CMLL Super Viernes main event saw the iconic Místico team with the dynamic duo of JetSpeed, Kevin Knight and "Speedball" Mike Bailey, against a formidable trio led by the legendary Volador Jr., Hechicero, and El Clon. This high-octane trios match promised a dazzling display of traditional lucha libre, pitting speed and innovation against experience and cunning.

match: The Young Bucks ( Matt Jackson and Nick Jackson ) vs. Don Callis Family ( Kazuchika Okada and Konosuke Takeshita )
description: The landscape of AEW was rocked when Kazuchika Okada shockingly aligned with the Don Callis Family, immediately setting his sights on the company's established pillars. This blockbuster tag team match at Dynasty saw The Young Bucks, AEW's Executive Vice Presidents, face the daunting challenge of Okada and Konosuke Takeshita, a battle for supremacy and a statement in the ongoing power struggle within the promotion.

This dream match at WrestleMania 42 Night 2 pitted two of WWE's most iconic and controversial figures against each other: CM Punk, in his triumphant return, and the dominant, record-breaking Undisputed WWE Universal Champion, Roman Reigns. The collision of the "Best in the World" and "The Tribal Chief" represented a generational clash for ultimate supremacy and the most coveted prize in professional wrestling.

This highly anticipated Dynamite encounter brought together two distinct forces in professional wrestling: Darby Allin, known for his fearless, high-risk offense, and Tommaso Ciampa, a master of brutal, calculated aggression. Fans eagerly awaited to see whose will would break first in this clash of contrasting, yet equally intense, styles.

Two of AEW's most dynamic and exciting competitors, Darby Allin and Konosuke Takeshita, collided on Dynamite in a match promising high-octane action. With Takeshita often accompanied by the manipulative Don Callis, Darby faced not only a formidable opponent but also the potential for outside interference in this thrilling contest.

match: Adam Copeland and Christian Cage vs. FTR ( Dax Harwood and Cash Wheeler )
description: This dream tag team encounter at Double or Nothing pitted two of wrestling's most celebrated duos against each other: the reunited legends Adam Copeland and Christian Cage, and the modern-day masters of tag team wrestling, FTR. This generational clash promised a technical masterpiece, as both teams vied for supremacy and bragging rights in AEW's stacked tag team division.

A fascinating dynamic unfolded at Double or Nothing as two prominent members of the Don Callis Family, Kazuchika Okada and Konosuke Takeshita, faced off in a highly anticipated singles match. This bout was more than just a contest; it was a battle for internal supremacy within the faction, a test of who truly stood as Don Callis's most formidable weapon.

match: Bandido , Noisy Boy, Spider Fly and Zonik vs. Gringo Loco , Vengador, Iron Kid and Turbo
description: Riot Lucha Libre presented an exhilarating 8-man tag team spectacle, featuring the high-flying sensation Bandido leading a team against the formidable Gringo Loco and his allies. This traditional lucha libre encounter promised a whirlwind of acrobatic maneuvers, lightning-fast tags, and non-stop action, embodying the spirit of "Lo Mismo Pero Sin Cambios" with its classic, chaotic energy.

match: El Grande Americano vs. "The Original" El Grande Americano
description: The stage was set for a truly unique and personal clash at Noche de Los Grandes Week 1, as El Grande Americano faced off against "The Original" El Grande Americano. This highly anticipated AAA/WWE crossover bout was more than just a match; it was a battle for identity and legacy, with only one man able to claim the rightful mantle of El Grande Americano.

At Impact's biggest event of the year, Bound for Glory, two of the world's most innovative high-flyers clashed as "Speedball" Mike Bailey took on Will Ospreay. This highly anticipated dream match delivered a breathtaking showcase of aerial mastery and hard-hitting action.

A monumental joshi puroresu clash at Stardom's All Star Grand Queendom saw Saya Kamitani battle the charismatic Tam Nakano. Their deeply personal rivalry exploded in the ring, resulting in a dramatic and emotionally charged encounter.

Two of the hardest-hitting competitors in joshi wrestling, Sareee and Syuri, faced off at Stardom The Conversion 2025. This bruising encounter was a true test of physical resilience, featuring intense striking and technical warfare.
